title: Zippy Zingers
poem_text:
Flibber flatch the zingy zooms,
Bouncy wouncy in the glooms.

Snickery snack the tickle-tocks,
Dizzy lizzy on the socks.

Jumple jump the flippy flaps,
Zappy zappy in the caps.

Wibble wob the sleepy snores,
Dreamy creamy through the doors.
cover_context: A glowing, swirly room where words float like bubbles in the air.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, piano and light brush drums, 116 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
